fields.label: Category
fields.options:
Hosting
Software License
Third-party API
Tools
Travel
Other

fields.label: Total Monthly (Company)
fields.description: Optional: what the company pays company-wide each month for this service. Use this + Project Share % to auto-compute Monthly Cost. Leave blank if you'll type Monthly Cost directly.

fields.label: Project Share %
fields.description: Optional: what fraction of the Company Monthly Cost this project pays for. Use with Total Monthly (Company) above to auto-fill Monthly Cost.

fields.label: Monthly Cost (₹)
fields.description: Per-month cost charged to THIS project. Auto-fills from Total Monthly (Company) × Project Share % when both are set, but you can override directly.

fields.label: Duration (months)
fields.description: Default = project duration from Section J. Override here if this cost runs for a different number of months (e.g. AWS billed only for 6 of a 9-month project).

fields.label: One-time Cost
fields.description: Tick if paid once. Total = Monthly Cost. Otherwise Total = Monthly Cost × Duration.

fields.label: Driver (Legacy)
fields.options:
Headcount
Labour Hours
Project Count
Revenue
Fixed Pct
